title: Tordylium carmeli
taxonomy: Tordylium carmeli is classified in the family Apiaceae, which includes a wide range of plants commonly known as the carrot or parsley family. This classification is based on the plant's characteristics, such as its flower arrangement and seed structure. The genus Tordylium is a group of flowering plants native to the Middle East and North Africa. The classification of Tordylium carmeli is also reflected in its botanical name, which follows the binomial nomenclature system developed by Carl Linnaeus.
